action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time, positions (mileposts) and tracks of all trains, and identifies current infrastructure outages or track statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves physical characteristics of specific locations like sidings or control points, including milepost locations and standing capacities.

location_id.description: The name of the siding or control point (e.g., 'Siding-Alpha', 'West-Exit').

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_train_instruction
action_set_definitions.description: Issues movement authority or routing commands to a train. Returns the expected time the train will complete the movement.

destination_id.description: The target track, siding name, or control point name.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment's internal clock to a specific time or by a specific duration. Returns the full state of the environment at that new time.

until_timestamp.description: The target time in HH:MM:SS format.

state_description.current_timestamp: The current simulation time in HH:MM:SS format.
state_description.train_statuses: A list of all trains currently active in the sector, including their positions and delays.
state_description.active_conflicts: Detected dispatching conflicts (e.g., head-on, rear-end, or schedule overlap).
